# EmptyState

A placeholder component displayed when there is no data or content to show, guiding users with a message and optional actions.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  EmptyState,
  EmptyStateContent,
  EmptyStateIndicator,
  EmptyStateTitle,
  EmptyStateDescription,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `EmptyState` | The root container for the empty state. |
| `EmptyStateContent` | The content wrapper for centering child elements. |
| `EmptyStateIndicator` | An icon or visual indicator area. |
| `EmptyStateTitle` | The title text for the empty state. |
| `EmptyStateDescription` | A descriptive message explaining the empty state. |

## Props

### EmptyState

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `size` | `string` | `"md"` | The size of the empty state component. |

## Usage

### Basic Empty State

```jsx
import { LuInbox } from "react-icons/lu";

<EmptyState>
  <EmptyStateContent>
    <EmptyStateIndicator>
      <LuInbox />
    </EmptyStateIndicator>
    <EmptyStateTitle>No results found</EmptyStateTitle>
    <EmptyStateDescription>
      Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you are looking for.
    </EmptyStateDescription>
  </EmptyStateContent>
</EmptyState>
```

### Empty State with Action

```jsx
import { LuPlus, LuFileText } from "react-icons/lu";

<EmptyState>
  <EmptyStateContent>
    <EmptyStateIndicator>
      <LuFileText />
    </EmptyStateIndicator>
    <EmptyStateTitle>No documents yet</EmptyStateTitle>
    <EmptyStateDescription>
      Create your first document to get started.
    </EmptyStateDescription>
    <Button>
      <LuPlus /> Create Document
    </Button>
  </EmptyStateContent>
</EmptyState>
```
